summary: Yt Line Phase Intro component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「LINE 整合阶段介绍卡」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-line-phase-intro/src/YtLinePhaseIntro.tsx` and `remotion/yt-line-phase-intro/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtLinePhaseIntro` and `ytLinePhaseIntroDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Line Phase Intro Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-line-phase-intro to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtLinePhaseIntroProps API and register the YtLinePhaseIntro composition with the default props.
